summary.key_theme: Eaton 透過 AI 驅動的能源管理軟體與硬體平台深化資料中心佈局，強勁的技術面與基本面持續吸引市場關注。

bullish.title: Eaton Deepens AI Data Center Role With NVIDIA Platform And Boyd Deal
bullish.reason: Eaton 與 NVIDIA 合作推出 Beam Rubin DSX 平台，直接切入 AI 資料中心基礎設施需求，具備高成長潛力。

bullish.title: Eaton Unveils Brightlayer Energy, an AI-Powered Energy Management and Optimization Software
bullish.reason: 推出 Brightlayer Energy 軟體，強化在醫療、教育與零售領域的能源效率管理，有助於提升軟體服務營收佔比。

bullish.title: Eaton Corp. PLC (NYSE:ETN) Presents a Compelling Growth and Technical Breakout Setup
bullish.reason: 技術面顯示突破訊號，結合高獲利能力與成長性，吸引投資人關注其股價動能。

bullish.title: Eaton (ETN) Laps the Stock Market: Here's Why
bullish.reason: 分析指出 Eaton 績效長期優於大盤，反映公司在能源管理領域的市場領導地位。

bullish.title: Barclays Sees Eaton (ETN) as “Battleground” While Jefferies Initiates Buy
bullish.reason: Jefferies 給予買進評級，儘管 Barclays 對估值持保留態度，但整體市場對其成長性仍有正面評價。

bullish.title: Eaton Recognized for the 15th Time as One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies®
bullish.reason: 連續 15 年獲選全球最具道德企業，有助於提升 ESG 評級與長期品牌價值。

bearish.title: A Look At Eaton (ETN) Valuation As Short Term Momentum Cools Against Strong Longer Term Gains
bearish.reason: 指出短期動能減弱且估值面臨挑戰，提醒投資人需注意股價過熱後的修正風險。

neutral.title: Eaton’s Brightlayer Energy Launch Tests Valuation In AI Power Management
neutral.reason: 此篇為 Brightlayer Energy 發布後的市場觀點，重點在於評估新產品對估值的影響，屬中性觀察。

neutral.title: If Cuba Rebuilds Its Power Grid, Which Companies Could Be Involved?
neutral.reason: 僅將 Eaton 列為潛在受惠廠商之一，缺乏具體合約或實質營收貢獻，影響力有限。
